verifier_values.criteria: States that Total NPV (ARO) if the Credit-Adjusted Discount Rate changes to 8.80% is $4,144,948,208.88 (acceptable range $4,103,498,726.79 to $4,186,397,690.97)

verifier_values.criteria: States that Total NPV (ARO) if Inflation Rate (Years 1-3) is one fifth higher than its current value is $4,800,168,195.63 (acceptable range $4,752,166,513.67 to $4,848,169,877.59)
verifier_values.negative_criteria: States that Total NPV (ARO) if Inflation Rate (Years 1-3) is one fifth higher than its current value is a figure other than $4,800,168,195.63
